channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI is ushering in a new era of colonialism
item.description: Critics say AI perpetuates stereotypes and erases cultural nuances for Indigenous communities as it changes global information gathering.

item.title: Pulte nomination triggers Senate GOP backlash
item.description: Just as Trump dropped one controversial move, he introduced another that angered Senate Republicans.

item.title: Stocks drive record share of American wealth
item.description: Data shows stocks, both directly and indirectly held, now make up an unprecedented portion of total assets.

item.title: Netanyahu squeezed between Trump and election year politics
item.description: A recent dispute with Trump over Lebanon highlights the conflicting pressures on Netanyahu's military and political strategy.
